Exterior.text: Overall Typical "Cub" Yellow with Black Accents in Traditional Cub Scheme

History.text: Built in 2001 and flown little. Sold into a Southern California desert hangared collection and not flown much. Then sold into a Bakersfield multi plane owner collection and not flown much. Then traded to Skywagons LLC for another plane. This Wag Aero Acro-Cub is literally like a 160 HP, solo-from-the-back, J3 with electric start and clipped wings with a fully aerobatic capability. And it is like new throughout. Complete logs. No damage history. Almost a new plane.
